caption: A man with glasses, a grey peaked wig, and headphones sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a yellow banner with the word "LEE" visible. On-screen text and logos appear as "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" on both the left and right sides of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man is seen speaking and gesturing with his hands. He initially moves his right hand downward, then lifts it toward his chest in a conversational manner, before settling into a pose where he holds his hand near his shoulder while continuing to talk. The camera angle and the studio environment remain static throughout the clips.
